hero.description: A purpose-built Progressive Web App for survivors, community members, and volunteers to log incidents securely, automate response workflows, and generate anonymized reports — even without internet access.
features.title: Everything your team needs
features.description: Built specifically for youth protection work in low-connectivity environments, with survivor privacy at the center.
features.structuredLoggingDesc: Three reporter types (self / survivor, on behalf of survivor, or volunteer with unique ID) log incidents with predefined fields — date, type, location, and description — ensuring consistent, complete records every time.
features.offlinePWADesc: Fill and submit incident forms without internet access. Data syncs automatically the moment connectivity is restored.
features.aiAssistantDesc: Built-in AI tools match incidents to referral services, assess risk severity, and generate FHIR health records — all without leaving the app.
features.fhirIntegrationDesc: Generate compliant healthcare bundles (Observation, Patient, ServiceRequest) for seamless referral to connected EHR systems and health information exchanges.
features.notificationsDesc: Email alerts trigger at every stage — from Community Mobilizer to Executive Director — with escalation for overdue actions.
features.rbacDesc: Volunteers, Counselors, Program Leads, and Executive Directors each see only what they need. Secure and accountable.
features.reportingDesc: Weekly, monthly, and annual summaries protect survivor privacy while delivering actionable insights for decision-making.
features.pdfExportDesc: Generate and download polished, anonymized incident reports in PDF format for stakeholders, donors, and analysis.
workflow.title: End-to-end incident response
workflow.description: Automated notifications keep every stakeholder informed and accountable at each stage of the process.
workflow.volunteerAction: Logs incident via safety gate, selects reporter type, enters volunteer ID (optional), submits form (offline or online)
workflow.mobilizerAction: Receives notification, reviews and coordinates response
workflow.counselorAction: Provides Psychological First Aid, fills full incident form
privacy.title: Survivor privacy is non-negotiable
privacy.point1: Personally identifiable information (PII) is anonymized before any report is generated
privacy.point2: Role-based access ensures only authorized staff view sensitive case details
privacy.point3: Offline sync means data never sits unprotected in a browser cache
privacy.point4: All data is stored in a secure, encrypted database
privacy.point5: Audit trails track every action taken on each incident
privacy.imageCaption: Serving youth and communities across Kenya
cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.description: Sign in to access the incident tracker. Your organization administrator will assign your role and permissions.
